MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Noreen Ikeuye.
Dave Gordon, Esq. for Plaintiff Fireman's Fund Insurance Company.
Prior Order granting request for waiver of live testimony-conditionally filed Dec. 23, 2003.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Fritzi Benesch, that the Plaintiff Firemen's Fund Insurance Company has neither a duty to defend nor a duty to indemnify Valli (Valerie) Tandler or Robert Tandler with respect to the matter entitled Benesch vs. Tandler and each to shall bear their own costs.
